radioActivity.description:
Current Inventory State.
Note: radioActivity is "unknown" when reader is configured to LLRP mode. i.e. When there are no endpoints mapped to the data interfaces.

antennas.description: antenna connection status. Note: Antenna status is "unknown" when reader is configured to LLRP mode. i.e. When there are no endpoints mapped to the data interfaces.

9.description: Antenna 9 connection status (only applicable to ATR7000)

10.description: Antenna 10 connection status (only applicable to ATR7000)

11.description: Antenna 11 connection status (only applicable to ATR7000)

12.description: Antenna 12 connection status (only applicable to ATR7000)

13.description: Antenna 13 connection status (only applicable to ATR7000)

9.description: Tags Read on Antenna 9 (only applicable to ATR7000)

10.description: Tags Read on Antenna 10 (only applicable to ATR7000)

11.description: Tags Read on Antenna 11 (only applicable to ATR7000)

12.description: Tags Read on Antenna 12 (only applicable to ATR7000)

13.description: Tags Read on Antenna 13 (only applicable to ATR7000)

numDataMessagesTxed.description: Number of Tag Data messages transfered

numErrors.description: number of Errors generated by Radio Control

numWarnings.description: number of Warnings generated by Radio Control

numErrors.description: number of Errors generated by Reader Gateway

numWarnings.description: number of Warnings generated by Reader Gateway

1.description: GPI pin number fallowed by its state

2.description: GPI pin number fallowed by its state

1.description: GPI pin number fallowed by its state

2.description: GPI pin number fallowed by its state

3.description: GPI pin number fallowed by its state

numDataMessagesTxed.description: Data Events sent to Reader Gateway

rootFileSystem.description: root file system update progress percentage

pin.description:
GPI pin number

Note:
Maximum number of ports available per device type
1. FX7500 = 2 GPI pins
2. FX9600 = 4 GPI pins
3. ATR7000 = 2 GPI pins

GPO pin number

Note:
Maximum number of ports available per device type
1. FX7500 = 3 GPO pins
2. FX9600 = 4 GPO pins
3. ATR7000 = 3 GPO pins

error.title: Error Event
error.description:
Error messages:

Reader Gateway:

cpu:
    CPU utilization @ %d%

ram:
    RAM utilization @ %d%

flash:
    FLASH utilization @ %d%

ntp:
    NTP synchronization failed offset %f and reach %d

reader_gateway:
    zmq polling failed in %s: %d
    data endpoint disconnected %s (when data path is configured different from cmd/rsp)
    data retention queue full (when data path is configured different from cmd/rsp)

Radio Control:

Antennas:
    Antenna Disconnected on Port %d
    Antenna Reconnected on Port %d

Database: 
    Failed to stop NGE before resetting database (%d)
    Failed to reset database while resetting database (%d)
    Failed to restart NGE while resetting database (%d)
    Database full, resetting database

Temperature:    
    Ambient Temperature Critical @ %d C
    PA Temperature Critical @ %d C

Radio Failures:
    Tx (PA) Failure on Port %d
    NGE Stopped due to error: %s
    NGE Error: %s

NGE API:
    Error parsing tag info packet

radio_control:
    zmq polling error failed in radio.cpp: %s

warning.title: Warning Event
warning.description:
Warning messages:

Reader Gateway:

cpu:
    CPU utilization @ %d%

ram:
    RAM utilization @ %d%

flash:
    FLASH utilization @ %d%

ntp:
    NTP synchronization failed offset %f and reach %d

reader_gateway:
    (not defined yet)

Radio:

Temperature:
    Ambient Temperature High @ %d C
    PA Temperature High @ %d C

Database:
    Database warning: %d%% full. Will reset at %s (or earlier)
    Resetting database

NGE API:
    API Error: 0x%08x
